steps_summary.description: Concise summary of the end-to-end U.S. equity forecast approach.

steps_detailed.description: Detailed summary of the end-to-end U.S. equity forecast approach that explicitly includes all stated assumptions, constraints, and conditions.

mermaid_diagram.description: Mermaid flowchart showing how initial variables feed intermediary steps or checks and lead to the final U.S. equity return output.

sub_models.description: Optional list of named sub-models or component models mentioned for this extraction target.

assumptions.description: Structural assumptions: relationships between variables, functional forms, causal links. Implied assumptions end with '(implied)'.

uses_regressions.description: 1 if any sub-model or the main model uses regression techniques (linear, logistic, panel, time-series); 0 otherwise.

uses_simulations.description: 1 if any sub-model or the main model uses simulation techniques (Monte Carlo, scenario simulation, stochastic simulation); 0 otherwise.

uses_averages.description: 1 if any sub-model or the main model uses historical averages, long-run averages, or equilibrium averages as inputs; 0 otherwise.

uses_mean_reversion.description: 1 if any sub-model or the main model assumes mean reversion of any variable (valuations, margins, rates, etc.); 0 otherwise.
